text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Greetings, I am Fuji Kiseki! And I shall be working with you from now on, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As an entertainer, I someday wish to perform
glorious miracles for all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
